testcase.name: contextLoads
testcase.system-out:
11:42:04.892 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [br.com.ccs.filasaude.FilasaudeApplicationTests]: FilasaudeApplicationTests does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 11:42:05.040 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration br.com.ccs.filasaude.FilasaudeApplication for test class br.com.ccs.filasaude.FilasaudeApplicationTests 11:42:05.171 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [br.com.ccs.filasaude.FilasaudeApplicationTests]: FilasaudeApplicationTests does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 11:42:05.174 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration br.com.ccs.filasaude.FilasaudeApplication for test class br.com.ccs.filasaude.FilasaudeApplicationTests 11:42:05.270 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.devtools.restart.RestartApplicationListener -- Restart disabled due to context in which it is running

Found 1 JPA repository interface. 2026-07-05T11:42:07.240-03:00 INFO 25888 --- [filasaude] [ main] org.hibernate.orm.jpa : HHH008540: Processing PersistenceUnitInfo [name: default] 2026-07-05T11:42:07.313-03:00 INFO 25888 --- [filasaude] [ main] org.hibernate.orm.core : HHH000001: Hibernate ORM core version 7.4.1.Final 2026-07-05T11:42:08.047-03:00 INFO 25888 --- [filasaude] [ main] o.s.o.j.p.SpringPersistenceUnitInfo : No LoadTimeWeaver setup: ignoring JPA class transformer 2026-07-05T11:42:08.092-03:00 INFO 25888 --- [filasaude] [ main] com.zaxxer.hikari.HikariDataSource : HikariPool-1 - Starting... 2026-07-05T11:42:08.502-03:00 INFO 25888 --- [filasaude] [ main] com.zaxxer.hikari.pool.HikariPool : HikariPool-1 - Added connection com.mysql.cj.jdbc.ConnectionImpl@4d16975b 2026-07-05T11:42:08.504-03:00 INFO 25888 --- [filasaude] [ main] com.zaxxer.hikari.HikariDataSource : HikariPool-1 - Start completed. 2026-07-05T11:42:08.564-03:00 WARN 25888 --- [filasaude] [ main] org.hibernate.orm.deprecation : HHH90000025: MySQLDialect does not need to be specified explicitly using 'hibernate.dialect' (remove the property setting and it will be selected by default) 2026-07-05T11:42:08.586-03:00 INFO 25888 --- [filasaude] [ main] org.hibernate.orm.connections.pooling : HHH10001005: Database info: Database JDBC URL [jdbc:mysql://localhost:3306/clinica] Database driver: MySQL Connector/J Database dialect: MySQLDialect Database version: 8.0.46 Default catalog/schema: clinica/undefined Autocommit mode: undefined/unknown Isolation level: REPEATABLE_READ [default REPEATABLE_READ] JDBC fetch size: none Pool: DataSourceConnectionProvider Minimum pool size: undefined/unknown Maximum pool size: undefined/unknown 2026-07-05T11:42:09.612-03:00 INFO 25888 --- [filasaude] [ main] org.hibernate.orm.core : HHH000489: No JTA platform available (set 'hibernate.transaction.jta.platform' to enable JTA platform integration) 2026-07-05T11:42:09.718-03:00 INFO 25888 --- [filasaude] [ main] j.LocalContainerEntityManagerFactoryBean : Initialized JPA EntityManagerFactory for persistence unit 'default' 2026-07-05T11:42:09.843-03:00 INFO 25888 --- [filasaude] [ main] o.s.d.j.r.query.QueryEnhancerFactories : Hibernate is in classpath; If applicable, HQL parser will be used. 2026-07-05T11:42:10.066-03:00 WARN 25888 --- [filasaude] [ main] JpaBaseConfiguration$JpaWebConfiguration : spring.jpa.open-in-view is enabled by default. Therefore, database queries may be performed during view rendering. Explicitly configure spring.jpa.open-in-view to disable this warning 2026-07-05T11:42:10.689-03:00 INFO 25888 --- [filasaude] [ main] b.c.c.f.FilasaudeApplicationTests : Started FilasaudeApplicationTests in 5.433 seconds (process running for 6.802)
testcase.system-err: Mockito is currently self-attaching to enable the inline-mock-maker. This will no longer work in future releases of the JDK. Please add Mockito as an agent to your build as described in Mockito's documentation: https://javadoc.io/doc/org.mockito/mockito-core/latest/org.mockito/org/mockito/Mockito.html#0.3 WARNING: A Java agent has been loaded dynamically (C:\Users\Cosme Cezar da Silva\.m2\repository\net\bytebuddy\byte-buddy-agent\1.18.10\byte-buddy-agent-1.18.10.jar) WARNING: If a serviceability tool is in use, please run with -XX:+EnableDynamicAgentLoading to hide this warning WARNING: If a serviceability tool is not in use, please run with -Djdk.instrument.traceUsage for more information WARNING: Dynamic loading of agents will be disallowed by default in a future release
